title: UK.OB.AccountSwitchStatusTypeValues
description: The switch status for the account. (Open Banking)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Not Switched
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicator to show that the account has not been switched to another ASPSP(Open Banking)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Switch Completed
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicator to show that the account has been switched and the switching process is completed. (Open Banking)
